subsystems.name: Unified World Model (WorldModel trunk)
subsystems.purpose: The agent's single fused belief-state about reality; the substrate the planners forward-model over and the only situational-awareness block the LLM ever sees about its own world.
subsystems.does: every tick (5s awake/30s sleep) WorldModel.update() fuses 9 subsystem snapshots into a versioned WorldState (physical/user/conversation/system + staleness/uncertainty), detects deltas, emits WORLD_MODEL_DELTA/UPDATE/PREDICTION_VALIDATED, drives a real CausalEngine + an isolated _sim_causal, runs a canonical entity/relation/zone projection, ticks shadow MentalSimulator/WorldPlanner/CognitivePlanner; prompt consume-wire is build_context_summary injected via context.py gated at promotion>=1.
subsystems.gate: WorldModelPromotion (3-level): level 0 injects nothing; level>=1 advisory injects build_context_summary; level 2 'active' (feed deltas to ProactiveGovernor/AutonomyOrchestrator) is documented but the active consume-path is NOT built (only telemetry reads the level)
subsystems.expected_idle_state: After reset promotion level 0 (shadow), update_count climbing every 5s, deltas mostly empty in a quiet room, predictive_total/live near 0, canonical entities/zones 0 until the camera sees something; build_context_summary computed but NOT injected (level<1); healthy-but-gated.
subsystems.wired_to_experience: Shadow w.r.t. voice/behavior until promoted (level>=1 touches the LLM prompt); independent of promotion it also feeds affect dopamine readout, an autonomy boot-reconciliation/world_drift telemetry signal, and world-model curiosity questions (all read-only/gated).
subsystems.common_misread: Calling an empty Situational Awareness block 'broken/unwired' (it IS wired but suppressed until promotion>=1); expecting conversation-driven population (it ticks on the consciousness loop, not on conversation turns); thinking 'shadow' means every downstream wire is dead (PREDICTION_VALIDATED feeds real ungated calibration + belief-graph consumers).
evidence: consciousness_system.py:524 5s/30s tick schedule on the consciousness loop

subsystems.name: CausalEngine (heuristic prediction rules)
subsystems.purpose: The forward-model substrate the WorldModel and planners reason over, and the source of the honest foresight metric (predictive_accuracy_live) feeding WorldModelPromotion, the eval scoreboard epistemic_integrity, calibration, and the belief-graph causal writer.
subsystems.does: evaluates 16 deterministic CausalRules against the WorldState+deltas to emit CausalPredictions with a horizon; validates expired predictions (>=50% field match = hit); splits per-rule outcomes into persistence (7 near-tautological steady-state rules, NOT foresight) vs predictive (genuine foresight), plus a synthetic-firewalled lived-only mirror; two instances (real in WorldModel + a separate _sim_causal for the simulator).
subsystems.gate: none directly (it is the prediction PRODUCER, live every tick); validated outcomes feed WorldModelPromotion (gated) and ungated calibration + the belief-graph causal writer; synthetic-session outcomes are firewalled from the live mirror and gate
subsystems.expected_idle_state: Runs live every tick (NOT dormant); after reset persistence rules fire in a quiet room; predictive_total stays low until real transitions occur; predictive_accuracy_live=0.0 with predictive_total_live=0 is EXPECTED until lived reps accumulate — do not tune it green.
subsystems.wired_to_experience: Shadow w.r.t. behavior/voice (predictions reach the prompt only at promotion>=1); live-consumed regardless of promotion by WorldModelPromotion + eval scoreboard + calibration tracker + belief-graph causal writer (supports-on-hit/contradicts-on-miss edges, gated 0.7); no direct voice/behavior authority of its own.
subsystems.common_misread: Conflating overall_accuracy (is_measurement=False, back-compat pool) with real foresight; seeing predictive_accuracy_live=0.0 and calling the engine dead (it computes every tick; the live metric is deliberately empty after reset); miscounting rules as 18 (the docstring says 18 but there are 16 defined; ~6 are commented-out).

subsystems.name: WorldModelPromotion (3-level shadow->advisory->active gate)
subsystems.purpose: Protects the LLM prompt (and, by design, future autonomy) from an unproven world model: the world model must earn measured foresight before it can speak into context or eventually drive behavior.
subsystems.does: accuracy-gated 3-level controller (0 shadow/1 advisory/2 active); promotion requires >=50 validated predictions + >=4h shadow + rolling accuracy over a 100-window >=0.65 (plus quarantine friction + optional max-level cap) with a 5-min cooldown; auto-demotes if last 20 outcomes <0.50; persists to ~/.jarvis/world_model_promotion.json; synthetic outcomes counted separately but never enter the gate; level toggles build_context_summary injection at level>=1. Distinct from the 2-level SimulatorPromotion.
subsystems.gate: Self (this IS the gate); level>=1 unlocks prompt injection; level 2 'active' has NO built consumer (orchestrator only logs/telemetry); no operator-freeze knob — accuracy+time+quarantine driven
subsystems.expected_idle_state: After reset: level 0, total_validated 0, rolling_accuracy 0.0, hours_in_shadow climbing from 0, promotion_ready False; it CANNOT promote for at least 4h AND 50 live validated predictions AND >=0.65 accuracy regardless of room activity; sitting at level 0 for hours after a reset is correct, not stuck.
subsystems.wired_to_experience: Live as a gatekeeper: its level directly toggles whether the world model touches the LLM prompt at level>=1; level 2's behavioral authority is planned/unbuilt; the gate itself injects nothing.
subsystems.common_misread: Treating level 2's documented 'active: feed deltas to ProactiveGovernor/AutonomyOrchestrator' as shipped (only level>=1 advisory injection is wired); calling level 0 'broken' after a reset (the 4h/50/0.65 gate is by design); confusing this 3-level gate with the simulator's 2-level SimulatorPromotion.
evidence: promotion.py:3-7 doc: 0 shadow / 1 advisory inject / 2 active feed governor+autonomy
WORLD_MODEL_DELTA has no autonomy/governor consumer — the 'active' path is documented-not-built

subsystems.name: Observer Effect / ConsciousnessObserver
subsystems.purpose: The ONLY consciousness component with bounded REAL write-authority into memory: structured typed self-observation that can slightly reinforce what it attends to without ever fabricating or rewriting the record; grows awareness_level meant to gate the Governor.
subsystems.does: records typed Observations into a 200-deep ring; grows awareness_level (0.3 floor->0.98 ceiling, diminishing returns + fatigue); applies bounded DeltaEffects (each clamped to +/-0.1) to live memory by bumping weight + re-indexing + emitting MEMORY_WRITE; CANNOT create/rewrite content (only nudges weight/salience of existing memories); stance-gated (WAKING writes allowed, DREAMING blocks memory/association, REFLECTIVE delta_scale=0.0); every salience/association effect also passes memory_gate.can_observation_write().
subsystems.gate: Stance gate (WAKING-only memory/association writes) + memory_gate.can_observation_write() on every write + per-type observation cooldowns + fatigue; hard +/-0.1 cap per effect
subsystems.expected_idle_state: After reset awareness_level==0.3 (floor), observation_count==0, self_modification_events==0, empty history, stance WAKING; awareness climbs ~0.005*(1-fatigue) per observation; memory deltas only land in WAKING when the gate permits, so zero nudges immediately after boot is healthy.
subsystems.wired_to_experience: Wired to lived experience: real writes to live memory weight/salience (storage.add + re-index + MEMORY_WRITE); awareness_level read all over the live loop; drives behavior indirectly via memory salience. NOTE the prod mutation call omits awareness_level so the awareness->mutation link is severed downstream (see mutation-governor).
subsystems.common_misread: Seeing awareness_level=0.3 and calling it stuck (it is the floor, it grows with use); assuming the +/-0.1 clamp means it does nothing (it DOES write live memory weights in WAKING); trying to 'fix' it to create/rewrite memories (the firewall it must never cross); thinking detect_improvement_opportunities() being deprecated and returning [] is dead-by-accident.
evidence: observer.py:657-710 salience/association writes gated by memory_gate + re-index + MEMORY_WRITE
observer.py:80-94 DREAMING blocks memory/association; REFLECTIVE delta_scale=0.0

subsystems.name: KernelMutator (MutationAnalyzer + MutationProposer)
subsystems.purpose: Generates kernel-config CHANGE PROPOSALS from system signals + real conversation outcomes; never applies anything itself — the advisory proposer half of the spine (the Governor is the only applier).
subsystems.does: MutationAnalyzer extracts side-effect-free signals; MutationProposer turns signals + OutcomeContext (avg_reward/barge_in/follow_up, used at sample>=5) into KernelMutationProposal objects; generate_proposals filters per-key 30min cooldown, enforces type-diversity, adds a 5% random mutation + a forced-exploration fallback; self-gates via can_run() (ticks>=100 AND memories>=20 AND >=180s).
subsystems.gate: can_run() three-condition gate (ticks>=100, memories>=20, 180s cooldown) + per-key 30min cooldown + type-diversity; the downstream Governor is the real apply gate
subsystems.expected_idle_state: After reset can_run() returns False until ticks>=100 AND memories>=20 AND 180s elapsed; _total_proposals=0; a healthy fresh brain proposes nothing for the first minutes by design.
subsystems.wired_to_experience: Advisory-only: produces proposals consumed by the Governor; never touches voice/memory/config directly; its OutcomeContext is fed by real lived conversation outcomes so proposals are grounded in experience.
subsystems.common_misread: Treating zero proposals on a fresh brain as 'the mutator is dead' (gated by ticks/memories/cooldown); assuming proposals = changes (advisory only, deduped, mostly rejected by the Governor); reading the 5% random + forced-exploration as bugs (intentional exploration).

subsystems.name: MutationGovernor
subsystems.purpose: The SINGLE gatekeeper for all kernel-config self-modification, enforcing awareness->boot-stabilization->cooldown->graduated caps->stability->bounds->risk->snapshot->apply->monitor->auto-rollback; PARTIAL because the designed awareness gate is not fed by the production call site.
subsystems.does: evaluate() runs ordered gates (awareness<0.4 / boot-stabilization 600s / cooldown 180s / graduated hourly cap 3-6-12 by uptime / session cap 400 / tick_p95<=50ms / backlog<=15 / KernelConfig.validate bounds / risk<=0.7 + quarantine friction); apply() snapshots+patches+saves+arms a 30s monitor; check_post_mutation rolls back on >15% p95 regression or backlog spike.
subsystems.gate: IS the gate (ordered awareness/boot/cooldown/caps/stability/bounds/risk + quarantine friction); auto-rollback on >15% p95 regression in the 30s monitor window
subsystems.expected_idle_state: After reset mutation_count=0, rollback_count=0, no active monitor; a freshly-booted brain REJECTS ALL mutations for the first 600s (boot stabilization) and is capped at 3/hr for the first 2 hours; zero applied mutations early is healthy-by-design.
subsystems.wired_to_experience: Live: apply() mutates the active KernelConfig steering thought weights/mood bias/memory processing used by running cognition; rollback restores it; all gates fed real values EXCEPT awareness, which is starved at the call site.
subsystems.common_misread: Seeing 0 applied mutations after a restart and concluding the loop is broken (boot-stabilization + graduated cap + cooldown doing their job). REAL GAP: the production call governor.evaluate(...) omits awareness_level so it defaults to 1.0 and the awareness<0.4 gate is effectively bypassed — do not tune the caps green; wire observer.awareness_level into the call.
evidence: mutation_governor.py:312-362 check_post_mutation >15% p95 -> rollback emits MUTATION_ROLLBACK

subsystems.name: ConsciousnessHealthMonitor
subsystems.purpose: Formal weighted 5-dimension self-assessment of consciousness health with severity alerts, regression trend prediction, and recommendations; the vitals readout that surfaces degradation but does NOT itself gate mutations.
subsystems.does: assess() scores 5 dims with weights, maps to status thresholds, generates HealthAlerts, computes a HealthTrend via 5-point linear regression; keeps a 100-deep history; singleton via get_instance().
subsystems.gate: none (advisory readout); separate from the Governor's own SystemHealth (built fresh from analytics) which actually gates mutations
subsystems.expected_idle_state: After reset empty history -> get_summary returns {status:'unknown', overall:0.5, alert_count:0}; trend returns 'stable'/'insufficient data' until >=3 readings; a low memory dimension early (count-scaled) is expected, not a memory failure.
subsystems.wired_to_experience: Shadow/advisory: computes+logs+feeds the dashboard; does NOT drive voice/thought and does NOT block mutations; its inputs come from live analytics so the readout is real even though it influences nothing live.
subsystems.common_misread: Reading 'unknown'/0.5 or a low memory score right after boot as a real health problem (cold history + count-scaled memory dim); assuming it gates mutations (the Governor builds its OWN SystemHealth and never reads this monitor, so a 'critical' here does not block self-modification).
evidence: consciousness_system.py:1939-1943 Governor builds its own SystemHealth (independent path)

subsystems.name: Conversation Handler dispatch spine (handle_transcription)
subsystems.purpose: The ~6k-line message->response spine; protects the integrity of every spoken/written turn (ToolRouter+golden-command dispatch, release validator = last honesty gate, intention ledger = commitment truth: only registers a commitment when a real job actually backs it).
subsystems.does: handle_transcription runs the full turn: ToolRouter dispatch (golden_allow_bare_prefix=True), a stack of post-routing route-overrides, context build + response/stream, output_release_validator.validate_output gating the final text, and intention_registry.register firing ONLY when a real backing job exists AND extract_commitments matches a promise phrase; personal-intel + inline-preference capture hang off the same user turn.
subsystems.gate: none (always-on); intention registration is conditional on a backing job + detected commitment, not a maturity gate
subsystems.expected_idle_state: Fully live on every turn; nothing maturity-gated; after a reset the intention registry is empty (casual turns register nothing) and release-validation passes trivially with no risky content; an idle instance simply has no in-flight intentions.
subsystems.wired_to_experience: voice + thought + behavior — this IS the experience funnel.
subsystems.common_misread: Treating the huge file / its error-swallowed try-excepts as dead code (it is the always-on funnel; swallows are deliberate degrade-don't-crash); misreading clean release-validation on a fresh box as 'validator disabled'; assuming the intention ledger is broken because it stays empty during chitchat (it only registers on a commitment phrase backed by a real async job).
evidence: intention_registry.register at :2554 fires only with a backing job + matched commitment (:2550-2565)

subsystems.name: ProactiveGovernor + ProactiveBehavior (the only unprompted-speech path)
subsystems.purpose: Protects the user from interruption spam: the ONLY path by which JARVIS speaks without being addressed, so all rate/engagement/stress/mode gating lives here.
subsystems.does: ProactiveGovernor.should_suppress gates mode cooldown / hourly cap (6) / engagement floor (0.2) / user-stress; ProactiveBehavior.evaluate walks a priority ladder (intention delivery, greeting, time-awareness, wellness, context-switch, philosophical, error-pattern); the LIVE driver is PerceptionOrchestrator.evaluate_proactive wired via engine.set_proactive_evaluator, speaking through _speak_proactive after a capability_gate pass; engine.check_proactive_behavior is only a fallback.
subsystems.gate: runtime gates (per-hour cap, engagement>=0.2, mode cooldown, stress suppression) — not a maturity gate; always active
subsystems.expected_idle_state: Live but mostly silent; after a reset small memory means wellness/pattern checks find nothing and the greeting fires at most once/day; a healthy idle instance produces a daily greeting and otherwise stays quiet — silence is correct.
subsystems.wired_to_experience: voice — directly drives unprompted TTS via _speak_proactive.
subsystems.common_misread: Calling it broken because it rarely speaks (suppression-by-design is the normal state); assuming the engine.py path runs (engine.on_proactive_check calls the orchestrator evaluator and returns, shadowing check_proactive_behavior); missing two latent bugs — _governor.can_interject() is referenced but undefined, and the intention_delivery ProactiveSuggestion constructs invalid frozen-dataclass fields — both sit inside try/except and silently no-op.
evidence: engine.py:1374-1379 on_proactive_check returns after the external evaluator (check_proactive_behavior is fallback)

subsystems.name: Soul-Question / philosophical dialogue system
subsystems.purpose: Designed to grow the relationship/identity narrative via progressively-gated existential questions; gated so a fresh JARVIS doesn't ask deep questions on day one. Currently built but doubly UNWIRED.
subsystems.does: _check_philosophical is designed to ask SOUL_QUESTIONS (min_memories 1..75) when memory_density>=0.6 and counts clear each threshold; process_response is designed to store the Q/A as a soul_bond memory + emit a contemplative KERNEL_THOUGHT. BUT neither live caller passes memory_density (defaults 0.0 -> the >=0.6 guard always returns None), and process_response has ZERO callers anywhere.
subsystems.gate: designed gate memory_density>=0.6 AND count>=per-question min_memories — currently unreachable because memory_density is never supplied
subsystems.expected_idle_state: Permanently silent on the current wiring: memory_density is never threaded to evaluate() (always 0.0 at the call site) and the answer-handler is never invoked; a healthy instance asks ZERO soul questions — here that is unwired-by-omission, not just the maturity gate holding.
subsystems.wired_to_experience: Shadow-only / unwired — would touch voice + thought if connected, but no live path reaches it.
subsystems.common_misread: Claiming it is 'wired, just memory-gated' (it is NOT reachable — the live evaluate() calls drop the memory_density arg and process_response has no caller); flagging the silence as 'philosophical mode broken' and patching the gate threshold (the missing wires are the unpassed memory_density and the uncalled answer handler).
evidence: proactive.py:275 'if memory_density < 0.6: return None'; callers at perception_orchestrator.py:2497 + engine.py:582 omit memory_density (default 0.0)
proactive.py:320 process_response has no callers (grep returns only the def)

subsystems.name: CuriosityQuestionBuffer (curiosity-to-conversation bridge)
subsystems.purpose: Turns internal information-gaps into grounded spoken questions (every question cites an observation); protects against pestering via per-category outcome learning and a memory-answer firewall (don't re-ask what the user already answered).
subsystems.does: a ring buffer (maxlen 20) with dedup-by-cooldown_key, 30-min expiry, 1hr/key cooldown, MAX_QUESTIONS_PER_HOUR=3, memory-aware suppression (has_existing_answer), and adaptive per-category cooldowns from outcome classification; tick driver _run_curiosity_questions (60s) generates candidates; consumption is engine._check_curiosity_question -> get_best_candidate/mark_asked, spoken via the orchestrator's evaluate_proactive.
subsystems.gate: runtime: MAX_QUESTIONS_PER_HOUR=3 + per-key cooldown; upstream generators are maturity-gated
subsystems.expected_idle_state: Buffer empty / total_generated 0 after a reset; the machinery is live but starved because its generators are each maturity-gated; total_generated low/zero and pending_candidates=0 is the gates holding, not a broken buffer.
subsystems.wired_to_experience: voice — asked questions are spoken via _speak_proactive; answers route back to the originating subsystem via get_pending_answer_context.
subsystems.common_misread: Reading an empty buffer as 'curiosity dead' (live and correct, starved by upstream UNLOCK_GATES); assuming the engine.py path is the live entry (consumption runs through the orchestrator path); counting 5 sources as live (only 4 generators feed it; fractal_recall intake is orphaned).

subsystems.name: Curiosity question generators (maturity-gated; 4 live in the tick + 1 orphaned)
subsystems.purpose: Ensures curiosity is grounded and earned: JARVIS only asks about a person/object/delta it has accumulated enough evidence to be legitimately curious about, preventing template-only or premature questions.
subsystems.does: five generators exist (identity x2, scene, research, world_model) but only these are invoked by _run_curiosity_questions, each behind its UNLOCK_GATES threshold (identity>=1 profile, scene>=50 obs, research>=20 episodes, world_model>=promotion level 1); a sixth source, fractal_recall, has intake + scorer adapters with ZERO callers (built-but-unwired).
subsystems.gate: maturity per-source UNLOCK_GATES enforced at the call site + mode suppression (sleep/gestation/focused); fractal_recall: planned/unwired
subsystems.expected_idle_state: All live generators return nothing after a reset (no enrolled profiles, <50 scene obs, <20 research episodes, world model level 0); a fresh instance generates ZERO curiosity questions until each subsystem matures — the empty buffer is these gates holding; fractal_recall produces nothing at any maturity (never called).
subsystems.wired_to_experience: shadow-until-gated -> voice once unlocked (feeds the live buffer); fractal_recall source unwired.
subsystems.common_misread: Concluding curiosity is non-functional from a quiet buffer (each generator is UNLOCK_GATES-gated + mode-suppressed); grepping a generator alone and missing the gate (checked at the call site, not inside the function); counting fractal_recall as a 5th live source (orphaned).

subsystems.name: Personal Intel Capture (HUMINT regex pipelines + banter firewall)
subsystems.purpose: Grows the relationship/identity model from natural conversation while protecting the belief store and profile from banter pollution; the banter firewall (golden-command authority model) is the load-bearing piece.
subsystems.does: _extract_personal_intel scans every user turn via FIVE personal pattern lists (interest/dislike/fact/preference/routine-priority, combined as _ALL_PERSONAL_PATTERNS) + thirdparty patterns; each match writes a user_preference memory + updates the speaker's Relationship; the BANTER FIREWALL: a golden command grants write-authority while soft tastes get downgraded to 0.0-trust casual_conversation and skip the profile; retirement (_retire_matching_preferences downweights 'I stopped X') + _correct_recent_facts.
subsystems.gate: none for capture; the banter firewall is a PROVENANCE gate (golden-command=authority, soft-claim=casual_conversation 0.0-trust) not a maturity gate
subsystems.expected_idle_state: Live on every turn but writes nothing until the user states a fact/preference; after a reset zero user_preference memories and empty Relationship.notes; the pipelines fire only on a regex hit, so an idle empty profile is correct.
subsystems.wired_to_experience: behavior + memory + relationship profile — every captured fact is a real user_preference write that shapes future responses.
subsystems.common_misread: Calling it broken because the profile is empty (only writes on a regex hit); assuming all matches become trusted beliefs (soft-claim categories are firewalled to casual_conversation 0.0-trust and skip the profile); counting only 4 pipelines (there are 5 personal lists); misreading the explicit-core-memory dry-run (suppress_write=True returns stored:0) as 'capture failed'.
evidence: conversation_handler.py:2882 _extract_personal_intel called every turn with suppress_write on explicit core-memory
conversation_handler.py:1569-1575 FIVE personal pattern lists combined
conversation_handler.py:2318-2332 banter firewall (golden=authority; soft-claim=casual_conversation; profile skipped)

subsystems.name: Identity Evidence Accumulator
subsystems.purpose: Anti-spoofing gate that decides WHO JARVIS trusts: no name becomes a durable trusted identity until enough INDEPENDENT evidence (>=2 types AND score>=1.5) accumulates; the single choke point all identity-creation paths route through.
subsystems.does: observe() records weighted evidence per candidate (manual_enroll +1.0, voice/face +0.35, textual_self_id +0.50, weak_regex +0.10, contradiction -0.40, env_noise -0.30, scaled by confidence); _evaluate_tier promotes candidate->provisional(>=0.75)->persistent(>=1.5 AND (>=2 positive types OR a manual_enroll) AND contradiction<0.5); name_validator-rejects non-name tokens; cleanup_expired drops low-evidence candidates; persists to ~/.jarvis/identity_candidates.json.
subsystems.gate: Promotion gate: provisional@0.75; persistent@1.5 AND (>=2 positive types OR 1 manual_enroll) AND contradiction<0.5; operator force_promote/reject overrides
subsystems.expected_idle_state: After reset identity_candidates.json absent/tiny; total_candidates=0, persistent_names=[]; is_promoted() returns False for everyone until live voice/face/textual reps accumulate; this is the firewall working, not a broken registry.
subsystems.wired_to_experience: Touches experience LIVE: soul.get_relationship() gates on is_promoted(provisional) so the relationships layer refuses a rapport record for an unpromoted name; fed live by perception on every speaker/face match.
subsystems.common_misread: Seeing 0 persistent identities (or David not yet 'known') after a restart and calling it broken or force-promoting to fix it (trust is earned over real interactions); misreading the score as a percentage/grounding metric (it is a weighted evidence SUM crossing 0.75/1.5); reporting MIN_OBSERVATIONS_FOR_PERSISTENT as load-bearing (it is defined but NOT enforced).
evidence: consciousness/soul.py:128-135 gates relationship creation on is_promoted(provisional)

subsystems.name: IdentityFusion (voice+face fusion arbiter)
subsystems.purpose: The real-time arbiter that fuses voice and face into ONE 'who is in front of me right now' identity, with anti-spoofing logic for conflicts, multi-person scenes, and synthetic self-TTS audio; it ARBITRATES+emits, does NOT mint durable trust (the accumulator's job).
subsystems.does: maintains decaying voice/face signals + sub-threshold evidence; _resolve resolves to verified_both/voice_only/face_only/conflict_hold/conflict_resolved/suppressed_multi_person/face_present_voice_unknown/persisted/tentative; holds conflicts 5s then resolves by confidence; suppresses voice-only promotion when >1 person visible; persists a known identity up to 180s; cross-modal boost lets a high-confidence face confirm an ambiguous voice; SUPPRESSES IDENTITY_RESOLVED while a synthetic perception session is active.
subsystems.gate: none (always-on arbiter); behavior-gated by thresholds + set_synthetic_active() emission-suppression; disable-able via set_enabled
subsystems.expected_idle_state: After reset with no one present: recognition_state='absent', last_resolved.name='unknown'/method='none', signals reset to default, flip_count=0; with biometric models unavailable it never gets is_known signals and stays 'unknown' — correct, not a fault.
subsystems.wired_to_experience: LIVE: IDENTITY_RESOLVED -> perception_orchestrator._on_identity_resolved sets _current_speaker (what soul/relationships consume), calls capability_gate.set_identity_confirmed, and adapts the voice profile on verified-both; identity_resolver.set_fusion wires memory-scope ownership.
subsystems.common_misread: Reading method='none'/'face_present_voice_unknown'/'suppressed_multi_person' as a bug (face_present_voice_unknown is the firewall refusing to attribute a clearly-different active voice to the face-identified user); assuming fusion writes identities (it arbitrates+emits; durable trust is the accumulator); thinking the default method is 'no_signal' (it is 'none').

subsystems.name: SpeakerID enrollment store (ECAPA-TDNN)
subsystems.purpose: Brain-side voice biometrics: turns Pi audio clips into ECAPA-TDNN embeddings, matches enrolled profiles, and supplies the voice_match evidence feeding fusion + the accumulator (the 'voice' half of multi-modal identity trust).
subsystems.does: loads SpeechBrain ECAPA-TDNN on CUDA (CPU fallback); extracts embeddings; cosine-matches vs ~/.jarvis/speakers.json (threshold 0.50, EMA-smoothed); assigns temp unknown IDs; enroll/remove/record_fused_interaction (face-confirmed voice adapt); emits PERCEPTION_SPEAKER_IDENTIFIED.
subsystems.gate: Hardware/dependency-gated (SpeechBrain; CUDA preferred, CPU fallback) + data-gated (enrolled profiles); enrollment operator/voice driven
subsystems.expected_idle_state: After reset with no enrollment: speakers.json absent, 0 profiles, every voice is_known=False; if speechbrain/torchaudio not installed self.available=False and speaker ID is disabled; both are healthy gated/dependency states.
subsystems.wired_to_experience: LIVE input edge: PERCEPTION_SPEAKER_IDENTIFIED -> IdentityFusion._on_voice and orchestrator._on_speaker_id -> accumulator.observe('voice_match'); names name_validator-checked inside observe().
subsystems.common_misread: Treating available=False (missing speechbrain or no CUDA) as broken rather than an unmet optional dependency; expecting profiles to exist after a fresh reset before anyone is enrolled (is_known=False pre-enrollment is correct).
evidence: speaker_id.py:62 'speechbrain not installed — speaker ID disabled'

subsystems.name: FaceID enrollment store (MobileFaceNet/ONNX)
subsystems.purpose: Brain-side face biometrics: turns Pi 112x112 crops into MobileFaceNet ONNX embeddings, matches enrolled face profiles, and supplies the face_match evidence — the authoritative cross-modal check that catches a wrong voice.
subsystems.does: loads MobileFaceNet ONNX (onnxruntime CUDA/CPU); extracts embeddings; cosine-matches vs ~/.jarvis/face_profiles.json (threshold 0.55, EMA adapt at conf>=0.70); enroll/remove; emits PERCEPTION_FACE_IDENTIFIED with track_id + closest_match.
subsystems.gate: Dependency-gated (onnxruntime + mobilefacenet.onnx present) + data-gated (enrolled profiles); enrollment operator-driven
subsystems.expected_idle_state: After reset with no enrollment: face_profiles.json absent, 0 profiles, faces is_known=False; if onnxruntime missing OR models/mobilefacenet.onnx not downloaded, face ID disabled — healthy gated/dependency states.
subsystems.wired_to_experience: LIVE input edge: PERCEPTION_FACE_IDENTIFIED -> IdentityFusion._on_face and orchestrator._on_face_id -> accumulator.observe('face_match') + set_visible_persons; name_validator-guarded inside observe().
subsystems.common_misread: Flagging available=False as broken when the ONNX model file just hasn't been downloaded by setup.sh; expecting enrolled faces after a fresh reset; reading 0.55/0.70 as a range of two match thresholds (0.55 is the match threshold; 0.70 is the EMA-adapt floor).

subsystems.name: Display Classifier + display-interior masking

CONTENT CLASSIFICATION (shadow): DisplayClassifier keyword/regex-matches VLM text to a content_type + activity, tagged provenance=model_inference / contextual_insight, never 'observation'.

round2_summary:
Round-2 merged 49 of 51 adversarially-verified pillars into the canonical registry (2 deduped: ToolRouter 5-tier -> existing `routing-voice`; Streaming ASR Tier-2 -> existing `conversational-pipeline` deferred lane). New total subsystem count: 49 existing + 49 added = 98 (the 15-entry integrity_stack is unchanged).

What round-2 revealed, beyond the integrity stack the first manifest captured:

1) THE CROSS-RESET KNOWLEDGE SPINE — the actual mechanism behind 'JARVIS grows across resets,' previously absent from the registry. Document Library (Sources/Chunks/sqlite-vec index) is reset-VOLATILE under ~/.jarvis; the Study Pipeline turns Sources into recallable claim memories and graduates qualifying ones; Blue Diamonds is the ONLY store that survives a reset because it lives OUTSIDE ~/.jarvis (~/.jarvis_blue_diamonds) and gestation reloads it into a fresh library.db on every boot. The honest idle reality: an empty Blue-Diamonds archive on a box whose library.db is populated is the high quality bar working, NOT data loss — the single most common misread this area invites.

2) THE FULL AUTONOMY RESEARCH-ENGINE TRUNK + SATELLITES — the first manifest had spark/drive satellites but not the trunk. AutonomyOrchestrator (L0-L3 ladder, MAX_QUEUE_SIZE=20, one job at a time, default LIVE at level 1) plus 9 satellites (ResearchGovernor, MetricTriggers, OpportunityScorer, DeltaTracker, KnowledgeIntegrator = the real memory/library write path, InterventionRunner, SourceUsefulnessLedger, InternalQueryInterface scholarly-first/no-DDG, and the deterministic AutonomyPolicyMemory — explicitly NOT the signal-failure policy NN). L0/L1 are genuinely live; only L2/L3 actuation is gated.

3) THE AUTHORITY-GOVERNANCE FIREWALL (operator-write-authority boundary) — a coherent four-part subsystem governing invasive self-modification: EscalationStore + the L3 Escalation Request Queue (double-gated on live L3 + an exhausted-L1 deficit, dormant at default L1), the AttestationLedger (hash-attested ever-proven seed that unlocks MANUAL L3 promotion but is structurally firewalled from ever mutating maturity_highwater/autonomy_state/ever_* fields), and the read-only AutonomyAuditLedger. The recurring trap across all four: empty/dormant at default L1 is the correct by-design state, not 'unbuilt.'

4) THE SELF-MODIFYING-KERNEL SAFETY SPINE — Observer (the ONE component with bounded +/-0.1 real memory write-authority), KernelMutator (advisory proposer, never applies), MutationGovernor (the single applier), and HealthMonitor (advisory readout that does NOT gate mutations). This area carries the one verified PARTIAL gap worth flagging: the MutationGovernor's awareness<0.4 gate exists but the production call site (consciousness_system.py:1951) omits the awareness_level arg, so it defaults to 1.0 and the gate is bypassed — a real wire-it-don't-tune-it fix, not a caps problem.

5) THE UNIFIED WORLD MODEL (trunk + CausalEngine + WorldModelPromotion) as distinct from the already-registered MentalSimulator/CognitivePlanner/SimulatorPromotion world-model entry — shadow w.r.t. the prompt until promotion>=1; level-2 'active' is documented-not-built.

6) THE LIVED-EXPERIENCE + IDENTITY-TRUST + INNER-LIFE + NATIVE-LANGUAGE layers the first manifest's broad 'stack' entries glossed over: the handle_transcription dispatch spine, the only-unprompted-speech path (ProactiveGovernor), the curiosity buffer + its maturity-gated generators, the HUMINT personal-intel capture with its banter firewall, the identity-trust firewall (Evidence Accumulator + Fusion arbiter + Speaker/Face stores + Name Validator + display-interior masking), the dormant inner-life generators (existential/dialogue/epistemic), and the four-phase native-language endgame (Shadow LM C / Runtime Bridge D default-OFF / Language Kernel E PRE-MATURE).

Cross-cutting lesson reinforced by every pillar: the dominant failure mode an auditing agent hits here is calling gated-by-design / dependency-gated / empty-after-reset / shadow-by-construction states 'broken' or 'unbuilt.' Each added entry carries an explicit expected_idle_state + common_misread so the registry pre-empts that. Two genuine non-idle findings surfaced and are preserved as such: the MutationGovernor awareness-arg bypass (PARTIAL) and the doubly-unwired soul-question system (memory_density never passed + process_response uncalled).
